case_title: SAND, JENNIFER ROBIN VS CHEREMISIN, PAVEL et al

docket_entries.description: SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF DEFENDANT SERVED AS TO PLAINTIFF SAND, JENNIFER ROBIN

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SAND, JENNIFER ROBIN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CHEREMISIN, PAVEL YELLOW CAB COOPERATIVE, INC. $976.79 PRINCIPAL, $72.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,048.79 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $976.79 FILED BY SAND, JENNIFER ROBIN AS TO DEFENDANT CHEREMISIN, PAVEL YELLOW CAB COOPERATIVE, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-14-1998 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT TO CHEREMISIN PAUL RETURNED FORWARD TIME EXPIRED;
CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $472.92 FILED BY CHEREMISIN, PAVEL YELLOW CAB COOPERATIVE, INC. AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT SAND, JENNIFER ROBIN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-14-1998 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
